# Safeword (Brussels)

Safeword is a Brussels non-profit organizing consent-forward kinky events and publishing community resources in English and French.

Primary site: https://safeword.be/
Canonical home (EN): https://safeword.be/
Canonical home (FR): https://safeword.be/fr/

Key URLs:
- Events (EN): https://safeword.be/events/
- Events (FR): https://safeword.be/fr/events/
- About (EN): https://safeword.be/about/
- About (FR): https://safeword.be/fr/about/
- Contact (EN): https://safeword.be/contact/
- Contact (FR): https://safeword.be/fr/contact/
- Volunteers (EN): https://safeword.be/volunteers/
- Volunteers (FR): https://safeword.be/fr/volunteers/
